category_sources: source_facts.description says GPA is a graphical user interface for GnuPG; GnuPG's GPA page describes it as the GNU Privacy Assistant GUI for GnuPG.
display_name_sources: GnuPG official GPA page names it GPA - The Gnu Privacy Assistant; source_facts.name is gpa.
docs_sources: Official GnuPG GPA page is the best official documentation surface found and includes release and project information.
repo_sources: GnuPG official Git access page says GnuPG and related projects are in public Git repositories under dev.gnupg.org/source; official GPA release page links to git.gnupg.org/cgi-bin/gitweb.cgi?p=gpa.git for changes.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a GnuPG GUI; GnuPG GPA page says it uses GTK+ and is a GUI for GnuPG.
